## Dashboard Integration

### Tab Navigation
- ✅ **Overview** - Key metrics, alerts, data matrix
- ✅ **AI Tab** - TIER 1 + TIER 4 features (8 engines)
- ✅ **Financial Tab** - TIER 2 + TIER 3 features (8 engines)
- ✅ **IoT Tab** - TIER 5 features (4 engines)
- ✅ **Sustainability Tab** - TIER 6 + TIER 7 features (7 engines)
- ✅ **Design Tab** - TIER 8 features (4 engines) ⭐ NEW

### Feature Cards per Tab
- Overview: 4 stat cards + 3 alerts + data matrix
- AI: 8 feature cards
- Financial: 12 feature cards
- IoT: 4 feature cards
- Sustainability: 7 feature cards
- Design: 4 overview + 6 detailed cards (10 total) ⭐ NEW

## Usage

### Run Dashboard
```bash
npm start
# Navigate to "Design" tab to see TIER 8
```

### Use SmartHomeDesignUI
```typescript
import SmartHomeDesignUI from '../components/SmartHomeDesignUI';

<SmartHomeDesignUI />
```

### Implement System Design
```typescript
import SmartHomeDesignEngine from '../core/SmartHomeDesignEngine';

const engine = new SmartHomeDesignEngine();
const result = engine.designCompleteSystem({
  imageData: base64Image,
  location: { lat: -1.2921, lng: 36.8219 }
});
```
